clips.title: The Call
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim apartment. A split-diopter shot keeping both planes in sharp focus at once: a ringing telephone large and crisp in the foreground on a table, and a person standing sharp across the room in the background, staring at it, hesitating. A person in casual home clothes. Warm lamplight, deep shadow, split-diopter dual focus, 35mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Key
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, suspenseful grade. A shadowy hallway. A split-diopter shot with both planes tack sharp: a hand holding a single brass key crisp and large in the foreground, and a locked door with a person standing before it sharp in the background. A person in a coat. Cool low light, hard shadow, split-diopter dual focus, 35mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: Last Drink
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody bar grade. A dim bar at night. A split-diopter shot keeping both planes sharp: a glass of amber whiskey large and crisp in the foreground on the bar, and a person seated further down the bar sharp in the background, watching. A person in smart evening attire. Warm bar light, bottle bokeh, split-diopter dual focus, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Move
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, focused grade. A quiet study, warm lamp. A split-diopter shot with both planes sharp: a single chess piece large and crisp in the foreground on the board, and a person sitting across the table sharp in the background, contemplating. A person in smart-casual attire. Warm lamplight, deep shadow, split-diopter dual focus, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Memory
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, emotional grade. A softly lit living room. A split-diopter shot keeping both planes sharp: a framed photograph large and crisp in the foreground on a shelf, and a person sharp in the background standing and gazing toward it. A person in casual clothes. Soft warm light, gentle shadow, split-diopter dual focus, 40mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Deadline
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, tense grade. A dim office at night. A split-diopter shot with both planes tack sharp: a ticking desk clock large and crisp in the foreground, and a person sharp in the background at a desk, working against time. A person in business attire. Cool desk light, deep shadow, split-diopter dual focus, 35mm. Subtle grain, 24fps.
